heroHeadline: Trump Admin Reaffirms Deportation of Wrongly Deported Abrego Garcia — This Time to Liberia
heroSubtitle: Administration defies Supreme Court order to return erroneously deported Salvadoran man; new target country is Liberia despite no known ties; legal experts warn of dangerous due process precedent
footerNote: Data sourced from DHS, ICE official records, ACLU, HRW, DHS OIG, TRAC Reports, Detention Watch Network, court records, and Congressional records
